name: TalentFlow Internal HR Agent
description: An AI-powered people operations assistant for internal HR teams. Handles employee wellness monitoring (burnout risk), attrition prediction, internal talent mobility, onboarding plan generation, leave management, exit interview analysis, and HR policy FAQ.

skills.name: burnout_risk_detection
skills.description: Assess individual or team burnout risk using overtime, leave gaps, open tickets, and appraisal recency data

skills.name: attrition_prediction
skills.description: Predict flight risk for individual employees or entire teams with data-backed retention strategies

skills.name: internal_talent_matching
skills.description: Match open roles against existing employee profiles to recommend internal mobility before external hiring

skills.name: employee_database
skills.description: Add new employees to MongoDB and maintain accurate employee records for downstream analytics

skills.name: leave_management
skills.description: Check employee leave entitlement, carry-forward rules, and usage based on company policy

skills.name: onboarding_plan
skills.description: Generate personalized day-by-day onboarding plans for new hires with 30/60/90-day milestones

skills.name: exit_interview_analysis
skills.description: Analyze exit interview transcripts to identify resignation root causes, sentiment, and team-level risk flags

skills.name: hr_email
skills.description: Draft and send professional HR emails to employees and candidates via Gmail

skills.name: policy_faq
skills.description: Answer employee HR policy questions on leave, WFH, appraisals, notice period, conduct, and more

skills.name: calendar_check
skills.description: Check today's or tomorrow's scheduled HR meetings from Google Calendar
